ideology: Utilitarian minimalism, content-first canvas, extreme negative space, zero visual friction

typography.font_family_mono: Google Sans Mono, JetBrains Mono, monospace

iconography_rules.behavior: Hollow outline by default. Fill states or color shifts are prohibited unless actively hovered, focused, or selected.

component_guidelines.layout: Enforce borderless components wherever possible. Use background color changes or padding over explicit stroke borders.
component_guidelines.buttons: Ghost or subtle variants dominate. Only use solid fills for primary call-to-actions, preferably leveraging the brand gradient.
component_guidelines.inputs: Must use the pill shape. Maximize height and interior padding. Placeholder text must be highly desaturated.
component_guidelines.transitions: All state changes (hover, active, visibility) must use an ultra-smooth cubic-bezier curve: `all 280ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)`.
